positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a vibrant constellation of mythical forest animals (deer, fox, owl, doe, bear) integrated with botanical elements like glowing mushrooms, fern leaves, and intertwining ivy. The animals should have clean, elegant silhouettes and a harmonious, cosmic feel. Color palette: deep indigo, celestial gold, emerald green, and moss tones, contrasted with stark white light. Composition: Circular or crest-like, designed to be centered on fabric. Style: Neo-tattoo flash, whimsical, detailed line art combined with watercolor wash accents. Lighting: Mystical glow, high contrast, deep shadows, perfect for screen printing. Print-friendly: Solid, readable artwork suitable for apparel.
negative: low detail, noisy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, ugly, mutated, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, photograph, realistic photo, grainy, jpeg artifacts
